steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a single HTML slide with mixed typography as specified, following the verification loop.

First, I'll write the initial HTML file with the required structure and styling:

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Quarterly Business Review</title>
    <style>
